name: Start Session
description: Initialize session — load agency config, select client, confirm context

name: Client Add
description: Create a new client workspace with config and output directories

name: Brand Audit
description: Full brand analysis — identity, online presence, current influencer strategy

name: Brand Competitors
description: Map competitive landscape and analyze competitor influencer strategies

name: Brand Audience Deep-dive
description: Deep-dive into the brand's target audience demographics and psychographics

name: Brand Fit
description: Define the ideal influencer profile for the brand — content style, audience alignment, values

name: Scout Discover
description: Run a full discovery pipeline — search, profile, score, and shortlist influencers

name: Scout Profile
description: Create a detailed profile for a specific influencer with metrics and scoring

name: Scout Compare
description: Side-by-side comparison of multiple influencers across all dimensions

name: Scout Trending
description: Find rising and trending creators in a niche before they blow up

name: Audit Full
description: Complete audit — content quality + authenticity + brand safety + performance patterns

name: Audit Content
description: Content quality assessment only — visual quality, storytelling, consistency

name: Audit Authenticity
description: Engagement authenticity and fraud check — detect bots, pods, fake engagement

name: Audit Safety
description: Brand safety risk assessment — controversial content, history review, audience review

name: Campaign Plan
description: Design a full campaign — objectives, influencer strategy, creative brief, budget, timeline

name: Campaign Brief
description: Generate a creative brief for content creators with messaging, deliverables, and guidelines

name: Campaign Budget
description: Create an optimized budget allocation plan with tier, platform, and contingency breakdown

name: Campaign Calendar
description: Build a content calendar and timeline with posting schedule and milestones

name: Outreach Sequence
description: Generate a full outreach sequence for a list of influencers with personalized messages

name: Outreach Draft
description: Draft a personalized outreach message for a specific influencer

name: Outreach Negotiate
description: Get negotiation advice — rate discussion, deal structuring, counter-offers

name: Outreach Follow-up
description: Draft a follow-up message with appropriate timing and tone based on cadence

name: ROI Forecast
description: Pre-campaign ROI forecast with expected reach, engagement, conversions, and ROAS

name: ROI Analyze
description: Post-campaign performance analysis with full metric breakdown and recommendations

name: ROI Compare
description: Compare ROI metrics across influencers — cost efficiency, performance ranking

name: ROI Benchmark
description: Compare performance against industry benchmarks by platform and tier

name: ROI Optimize
description: Generate budget optimization recommendations based on performance data

name: IMA Help
description: Get unstuck — see what workflow steps come next or ask questions about IMA

name: Guided Wizard
description: Start the guided wizard for step-by-step workflow assistance

name: Party Mode
description: Orchestrate multi-agent discussions — bring multiple IMA agents together to collaborate

name: Scout Expand
description: Find more influencers similar to a given creator

name: Brand Compare
description: Compare two brands' influencer marketing approaches side by side

name: Campaign Match
description: Score and match influencers to a campaign based on brand brief

name: Outreach Template
description: Generate a reusable outreach template (initial, follow-up, negotiation, thank-you)

name: Audit Batch
description: Quick audit of multiple influencers in abbreviated format
